seoTitle: Rockyview vs Rodds Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rockyview and Rodds Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Rockyview vs Rodds Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rockyview and Rodds Bay.
heading: Rockyview vs Rodds Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rockyview, Queensland and Rodds Bay, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rodds Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Rockyview (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rockyview or Rodds Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rockyview has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Rodds Bay scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rockyview scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Rodds Bay scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rockyview or Rodds Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rodds Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
